:::info
This is the **V2 Multifamily Property Playbook template**. Duplicate this doc for each property, then replace `Property Address / Name` with the property's abbreviated address. Fill in each section with photos, drawings, vendor contacts, and access details.

:::

## Access & Layout

### Building & Unit Access

* Instruction & picture on how to access the building and all the units
* Drawing and description of unit layout relative to each other (helpful for leak tracing, sound complaints, etc.)
* Instruction & picture on how to access the roof (if interior access)
* Entry code systems / callbox vendor + access reset procedure

### Key & Lockbox Management

* Keybox location (with photo)
* Key duplication policy / vendor

## Mail, Parking & Storage

### Mailboxes

* Picture of mailboxes
* Mailbox Assignment Table
* USPS access procedure if replacement needed

### Parking / Towing

* Picture of parking lot
* Drawing or satellite overlay
* Parking Assignment Table
* Parking Lot Audit (numbered stalls)
* Towing signage + vendor contact info

### Garage / Remote

* Picture & instruction for garage door
* Garage door vendor + contact
* Remote programming instructions

## Amenities & Common Areas

### Laundry

* Picture + access instructions
* Vendor (coin-op, card, in-unit)
* Appliance ID + location

### Storage

* Picture & access instructions (number lockers, layout)
* Storage Assignment Table
* Storage Audit, if needed

### Common Areas / Courtyard / Lobby

* Access instructions
* Picture + description of amenities (BBQ, seating, garden, etc.)
* Hours of use / noise policy signage

### Bike Storage

* Location + access
* Assignment procedure

## Maintenance, Utilities & Equipment

### Maintenance Room

* Picture & instructions for access
* Contents list (e.g., cleaning supplies, spare parts, filters)
* Alarm or keypad code if applicable

#### Garbage / Recycling

* Pictures of bins, enclosures, and pickup area
* Schedule and vendor info

#### Water Meter / Shut Off

* Picture + map location
* Meter numbers per unit
* Emergency water shut-off location

#### Electric Meter

* Access instructions + labeling by unit
* Meter location map

#### Gas Meter

* Picture + labeling per unit
* Shut-off valve location

#### Backflow Device

* Picture + access instructions
* Inspection frequency & vendor

#### Hot Water Heaters / Boilers

* Location + photo per heater
* Serial numbers + capacity
* Service vendor + inspection dates

#### HVAC / Mini-Split Systems

* Picture + unit IDs + filter sizes
* Service vendor + filter replacement frequency

## Safety & Compliance

### Fire Safety

* Fire safety vendor contact
* Extinguisher locations + inspection log
* Sprinkler room access + photo
* Fire panel access + reset instructions

### Emergency Shut-Offs

* Main water shut-off location
* Main power shut-off
* Gas shut-off

### Elevator / Elevator Room

* Photo of elevator interior + control panel
* Vendor name + service contact
* Access to elevator mechanical room
* Inspection certificate photo
